_description: Pure observability. Kills nothing. Use this if you want cc-procs.ps1 diagnostics and cleanup-orphans.ps1 dry-run reports without ever taking destructive action -- even with -Force.
_when_to_use: Compliance environments, shared dev boxes, or when you're auditing what cleanup WOULD do without committing. Pair with the SessionStart hook to get per-session telemetry without side effects.
